channel.title: Advisory Monks Consulting · Insights
channel.description: Practical tax, legal, and structuring notes for Indian founders, VC firms, incubators, NRIs, and foreign companies.

item.title: Form 13 LDC for NRIs: when it works, when it doesn't.
item.description: When a Form 13 Lower Deduction Certificate actually helps NRIs reduce TDS on Indian income — and when it does not. Practical guidance from Advisory Monks Consulting.

item.title: Flip structuring after GAAR. Delaware, Singapore, Cayman, IFSC, UAE compared.
item.description: How GAAR changes flip structuring for Indian startups. Delaware, Singapore, Cayman, IFSC GIFT City, and UAE compared for holding-company structures.

item.title: What changed in India-US transfer pricing for FY26.
item.description: What changed in India-US transfer pricing for FY26 — documentation thresholds, safe harbours, and practical compliance for cross-border related-party transactions.

item.title: The Income-tax Act, 2025 — what changes for founders, NRIs and foreign companies
item.description: India's Income-tax Act, 2025 (effective 1 April 2026): what it replaces, the new tax year, and a 1961-to-2025 section map for cross-border and founder tax.
